channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ADC Alleges Pressure from FCT Minister and FCDA to Cancel Convention Venue Booking
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don talk say the owner of Rainbow Event Centre wey dem plan to use for their national convention dey under serious pressure from the Federal Capital Development A...

item.title: PKTT probes killing of Emfuleni municipal finance official in Vanderbijlpark
item.description: The Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) is investigating the murder of Martha Mani Rantsofu, a finance official at the Emfuleni Local Municipality in Gauteng, who was gunned down in Vanderbijlpark on ...

item.title: Analysis of Viktor Orbán’s political legacy and its influence on the global far right after Hungary’s election
item.description: This opinion piece examines the long tenure of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán and the political legacy he leaves behind following his departure from office after 16 years in power. Orbán first ...

item.title: Canadian citizen killed in southern Lebanon amid Israel–Hezbollah conflict, Ottawa calls for ceasefire
item.description: A Canadian citizen has been killed in southern Lebanon amid escalating hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah, according to Foreign Affairs Minister Anita Anand. The victim has been identified by co...

item.title: Waymo seeks to introduce self-driving rideshare vehicles in Toronto amid opposition from mayor's office
item.description: A California-based company, Waymo, is reportedly exploring the possibility of launching self-driving rideshare vehicles, also known as driverless taxis, in Toronto. According to recent reports, the co...

item.title: US escalation in Iran conflict raises global economic and diplomatic risks, warns commentary
item.description: The article examines the escalating geopolitical and economic consequences of the United States’ involvement in a worsening conflict with Iran under Donald Trump’s leadership. It argues that what had ...

item.title: PTI raises alarm over Ejaz Chaudhry's deteriorating health in Kot Lakhpat Jail
item.description: The Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) party has expressed serious worries about the health condition of its senior leader Ejaz Chaudhry, who is currently serving a 10-year jail term in Kot Lakhpat Jail, ...

item.title: Iran's Proposal to Toll Strait of Hormuz Sparks International Concern
item.description: Iran's recent proposal to impose tolls on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz has sent ripples of concern throughout the international community. The move, included in a 10-point proposal aimed at e...

item.title: Government launches pilot ₱10-per-liter fuel subsidy for jeepney drivers in Metro Manila
item.description: The Philippine government has begun a pilot rollout of a fuel subsidy program for public utility jeepneys in Metro Manila, offering a ₱10 per-liter discount starting Tuesday, April 14. The initiative,...

item.title: Farage and Yusuf criticise Tory Brexit betrayal and post-referendum immigration policy at Reform UK press conference
item.description: In a recent Reform UK press conference, Nigel Farage and his colleague Zia Yusuf expressed ongoing frustration with the Conservative Party's handling of Brexit and immigration over the past decade. Fa...

item.title: GrandWest and Breadline Africa complete R1.36 million upgrade of Nosapho ECD centre in Khayelitsha
item.description: The Nosapho Early Childhood Development (ECD) centre in Khayelitsha has officially completed a major infrastructure upgrade valued at R1,365,140, marking a significant milestone in a journey that bega...

item.title: Why Hot Fuzz is a standout feelgood comedy and enduring comfort watch
item.description: This article is part of a Guardian series in which writers reflect on their favourite comfort films, with this instalment focusing on Edgar Wright’s 2007 action-comedy Hot Fuzz. The author explains ho...

item.title: NASA Announces New Strategy: ISS Core Module Extension for Seamless Transition to Private Stations
item.description: During the NASA Ignition event in late March 2026, Administrator Jared Isaacman outlined updates to the Artemis program alongside a revised plan for the International Space Station (ISS), which is sla...

item.title: Kenya newspaper review highlights Ruto’s confidence, national projects, and key social and political issues
item.description: Kenya’s major newspapers on April 14, 2026, highlighted a mix of political tension, governance challenges, and social issues across the country. A key focus was President William Ruto’s strong respons...

item.title: Christine Fair criticises India’s response to the Islamabad summit and its diplomatic tone
item.description: In an interview with Scroll.in, American political scientist and Pakistan expert Dr Christine Fair discussed India’s reaction to the recent Islamabad summit that brought together the United States and...

item.title: Three policemen martyred and five injured in attack on anti-poppy operation team in Diamer district, Gilgit-Baltistan
item.description: In a tragic incident in Gilgit-Baltistan’s Diamer district, three police officials were martyred and five others, including a Deputy Superintendent of Police, sustained injuries when unknown assailant...

item.title: Militants attack Nigerian army base in Borno, killing commander and six soldiers
item.description: Islamist militants carried out a deadly attack on a Nigerian army base located near the northeastern border with Chad, leaving the base commander and six soldiers dead. According to military sources w...

item.title: Government intensifies safety campaigns to reduce motorcycle-related road injuries
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has increased efforts to improve road safety by expanding its safety training and awareness programmes for motorcycle riders, popularly known as bodaboda. Speaking in Dar es...

item.title: How War and Shipping in the Strait of Hormuz Threaten a Unique Marine Ecosystem
item.description: The article describes how the fragile marine ecosystem in the Strait of Hormuz and the wider Arabian Gulf is being endangered by renewed military tension and heavy shipping traffic. Beneath one of the...

item.title: Senator Sharafadeen Alli questions legitimacy of Ibadan chieftaincy installation conducted in his absence
item.description: Senator Sharafadeen Alli, who represents Oyo South Senatorial District in the Nigerian Senate, has publicly criticised Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, over his installation as one of the newly eleva...
